description: ol-style-deep-nesting (issue #169): reproduces spec/style-guide.md's own canonical bad example — a `repeat` nested inside an `if` nested inside another `repeat`, three control-form levels deep (matching DEEP_NESTING_THRESHOLD). The innermost repeat is flagged with depth 3; extracting a helper procedure or adding labeled `end`s is the suggested fix (message only, not asserted here).
